capabilities: Establish a decision-making process that is transparent, repeatable, and verifiable, ensuring all decisions are made based on predefined criteria and rules.

procedure.action: Capture decision requirements using a structured template to document criteria, options, and rules using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Assert decision criteria against historical data using a decision matrix to ensure relevance and applicability by asserting all required fields conform to the schema definition; emit VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field; assert field_validation_pass_rate >= 1.0.

State criteria explicitly in a decision log, ensuring all stakeholders have access to the documented criteria using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Score options using a weighted scoring model to quantitatively evaluate each option against the criteria using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Execute decision rules using a rule engine to automate the selection of the optimal option based on scores.

summary: Implement a structured decision framework to ensure decisions are consistent and auditable by applying defined criteria, evaluating options, and enforcing rules.
title: Decision Framework for Consistent and Auditable Outcomes

failureConditions: Inconsistent decisions due to undocumented criteria.
Decisions not auditable due to lack of logging.
Suboptimal choices due to subjective scoring.
metrics: decision criteria against historical data using a decision matrix to ensure relevance and applicability by asserting all
successConditions: Check if all decisions are logged with criteria and scores; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Verify that decision outcomes are consistent with historical data; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Ensure that all stakeholders can access the decision logs; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
